home.subtitle: Daily Bible reading guide and devotionals from the Protestant Christian Church in Bali (GKPB). Free and open for everyone.

featureDesc.pujidanjanji: A guided daily Bible reading plan to build spiritual discipline.
featureDesc.janjihidup: Daily reflections to apply God's word in real life.
featureDesc.pustaka: Access documents, church governance, and GKPB training materials.
featureDesc.ayat: A curated collection of special verses — weekly, monthly, and yearly.

tentang.title: About the App
tentang.privacyDesc: This app does not collect personal user data. All settings are stored locally on your device.
tentang.privacyDesc2: Preferences such as text size, language, and saved verses are stored only on your own device and are never sent to any server.
tentang.privacyDesc3: All content can be accessed without an internet connection after installing the app (PWA).
tentang.offlineDesc: This app can be used offline after the first visit.
tentang.managedBy: Managed by the IT Team of GKPB Synod Office
tentang.copyright: Protestant Christian Church in Bali Synod

pengaturan.title: Settings
pengaturan.notifDenied: Notifications blocked. Enable them through your browser settings.
pengaturan.installDesc: Add this app to your home screen for faster access.
pengaturan.installStatusNotInstalled: Not installed — add to home screen
pengaturan.appStatusDesc: Version {version} · Service Worker active · Content available offline
pengaturan.dangerZoneDesc: Delete all saved preferences (bookmarks, text size, language, reminders). Devotional data is not affected.
pengaturan.clearCacheDesc: Removes temporarily stored data on your device.

offline.title: You Are Offline
offline.subtitle: No internet connection available. Some content may not load.
offline.cachedDesc: You can still access content that was previously loaded.

notif.testBody: Notifications are working! Have a blessed time with God.
notif.dailyBody: Today's devotional is ready. Have a blessed time with God!
